heading: Phase II of groundwater recharge demonstration program
label: 390g–2 Phase II of groundwater recharge demonstration program
notes: Amendments1992—Subsec. (c). substituted “summary report” for “final report” in two places in introductory provisions of par. (2) and added pars. (3) to (5).Pub. L. 102–575
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (c). substituted “summary report” for “final report” in two places in introductory provisions of par. (2) and added pars. (3) to (5).Pub. L. 102–575

children.heading: Design, construction, and operation of projects
children.label: a Design, construction, and operation of projects
children.text: During phase II, and subject to State water laws and interstate water compacts, the Bureau is authorized and directed to design, construct, and operate demonstration projects in the High Plains States and other Reclamation Act States to recharge groundwater systems as recommended in the report referred to in subsection (c).

children.heading: Alternative means of cost allocation; economic feasibility of projects
children.label: b Alternative means of cost allocation; economic feasibility of projects
children.text: During phase II the Secretary, acting through the Bureau, shall contract with the various High Plains States and other Reclamation Act States to conduct a study to identify and evaluate alternative means by which the costs of groundwater recharge projects could be allocated among the beneficiaries of the projects within the respective States and identify and evaluate the economic feasibility of and the legal authority for utilizing groundwater recharge in water resource development projects.

Within twelve months after the initiation of phase II, and at annual intervals thereafter, the Secretary shall submit interim reports to Congress. Each report shall contain a detailed statement of his findings and progress respecting the design, construction, and operation of the demonstration projects referred to in subsection (a) and the study referred to in subsection (b).

children.label: A
children.text: a detailed evaluation of the demonstration projects referred to in subsection (a);

children.label: B
children.text: the results of the studies referred to in subsection (b);

children.label: C
children.text: specific recommendations regarding the location, scope, and feasibility of operational groundwater recharge projects to be constructed and maintained by the Bureau; and

children.label: D
children.text: an evaluation of the feasibility of integrating these groundwater recharge projects into existing reclamation projects.

In addition to recommendations made under , the Secretary shall make additional recommendations for design, construction, and operation of demonstration projects. Such projects are authorized to be designed, constructed, and operated in accordance with subsection (a).section 390g–1 of this title
Each project under this section shall terminate five years after the date on which construction on the project is completed.
At the conclusion of phase II the Secretary shall submit a final report to the Congress which shall include, but not be limited to, a detailed evaluation of the projects under this section.
